japanese: 駆逐してやる!この世から一匹残らず!
romaji: Kuchiku shite yaru! Kono yo kara ippiki nokorazu!
english: I'll exterminate them! Every last one from this world! (alt wording 36) (alt wording 88)

japanese: おれは人間を超越する！
romaji: Ore wa ningen o chouetsu suru!
english: I will transcend humanity! (alt wording 14)

japanese: グララララ
romaji: Gurararara
english: Gurararara! (alt wording 31) (alt wording 83)

japanese: 月に代わっておしおきよ!
romaji: Tsuki ni kawatte oshioki yo!
english: In the name of the moon, I'll punish you! (alt wording 41)

japanese: 痛みを伴わない教訓には意味がない
romaji: Itami o tomonawanai kyoukun ni wa imi ga nai
english: A lesson without pain is meaningless.

japanese: オレ様の美技にブギウギ
romaji: Ore-sama no bigi ni bugiugi
english: Dance to my beautiful technique! (alt wording 23) (alt wording 75)

japanese: 守るものがある限り、俺は負けない
romaji: Mamoru mono ga aru kagiri, ore wa makenai
english: As long as I have something to protect, I won't lose. (alt wording 43)

japanese: まだだ、まだ終わらんよ！
romaji: Mada da, mada owaran yo!
english: Not yet! It's not over yet! (alt wording 22) (alt wording 74)

japanese: マママママ
romaji: Mama mama mama
english: Mama mama mama. (alt wording 29)

japanese: 俺を誰だと思ってやがる!
romaji: Ore o dare da to omotte yagaru!
english: Who the hell do you think I am! (alt wording 46)

japanese: 俺を誰だと思ってやがる!
romaji: Ore o dare da to omotte yagaru!
english: Who the hell do you think I am! (alt wording 46)

japanese: 仲間を信じることが俺の魔法だ
romaji: Nakama o shinjiru koto ga ore no mahou da
english: Believing in my friends is my magic. (alt wording 49)

japanese: 僕は新世界の神となる
romaji: Boku wa shin sekai no kami to naru
english: I will become the god of the new world. (alt wording 44)

japanese: 仲間を大切にしない奴はそれ以上のクズだ
romaji: Nakama o taisetsu ni shinai yatsu wa sore ijou no kuzu da
english: Those who don't take care of their comrades are worse than scum. (alt wording 34) (alt wording 86)

japanese: ロードローラーだッ！
romaji: Rodo rora da!
english: Road roller! (alt wording 1) (alt wording 53)

japanese: シシシシシ
romaji: Shishishishi
english: Shishishi! (alt wording 30)

japanese: オラに元気を分けてくれ!
romaji: Ora ni genki o wakete kure!
english: Lend me your energy! (alt wording 52)

japanese: だが…それがいい。
romaji: Daga... sore ga ii.
english: But... that's what I like. (alt wording 16) (alt wording 68)
anime: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Diamond is Unbreakable

japanese: だが…それがいい。
romaji: Daga... sore ga ii.
english: But... that's what I like. (alt wording 16) (alt wording 68)
anime: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Diamond is Unbreakable

japanese: 撃っていいのは撃たれる覚悟がある奴だけだ
romaji: Utte ii no wa uterareru kakugo ga aru yatsu dake da
english: Only those prepared to be shot should pull the trigger. (alt wording 45)
anime: Code Geass: Lelouch of the Rebellion

japanese: 笑えばいいと思うよ
romaji: Waraeba ii to omou yo
english: I think you should just laugh.

japanese: だが…それがいい。
romaji: Daga... sore ga ii.
english: But... that's what I like.
anime: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Diamond is Unbreakable

japanese: 逃げるのも勇気だぞ
romaji: Nigeru no mo yuuki da zo
english: Running away can take courage too.

japanese: オラに元気を分けてくれ!
romaji: Ora ni genki o wakete kure!
english: Lend me your energy!

japanese: 貴様ッ！見ているなッ！！
romaji: Kisama! Mite iru na!!
english: You! You're watching me! (alt wording 11)

japanese: 月に代わっておしおきよ!

romaji: Shishishishi

japanese: おまえはもう死んでいる
romaji: Omae wa mou shindeiru
english: You're already dead.

japanese: 明日の問題は明日の俺に任せる
romaji: Ashita no mondai wa ashita no ore ni makaseru
english: I'll leave tomorrow's problems to tomorrow's me.

japanese: 痛みを伴わない教訓には意味がない

japanese: 月に代わっておしおきよ!

english: In the name of the moon, I'll punish you!

japanese: 俺は趣味でヒーローをやっている者だ
romaji: Ore wa shumi de hiiroo o yatte iru mono da
english: I'm just a hero for fun.

japanese: グララララ
romaji: Gurararara
english: Gurararara!

japanese: シシシシシ
romaji: Shishishishi

japanese: 世界は残酷だ…それでも美しい
romaji: Sekai wa zankoku da... soredemo utsukushii
english: This world is cruel... yet so beautiful.

japanese: 世界は残酷だ…それでも美しい
romaji: Sekai wa zankoku da... soredemo utsukushii

japanese: 今日の俺は一味違うぜ！
romaji: Kyou no ore wa hitomi chigau ze!
english: I'm on a different level today! (alt wording 13) (alt wording 65)
anime: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Diamond is Unbreakable

japanese: 俺は海賊王になる！
romaji: Ore wa kaizoku ou ni naru!
english: I'm gonna be King of the Pirates! (alt wording 20)

japanese: やれやれだぜ
romaji: Yare yare da ze

japanese: これがシュタインズ・ゲートの選択だ。
romaji: Kore ga Shutainzu Gēto no sentaku da.
english: This is the choice of Steins Gate.

japanese: 何でもは知らないわよ。知ってることだけ。
romaji: Nandemo wa shiranai wa yo. Shitteru koto dake.
english: I don't know everything. I only know what I know.

japanese: 駆逐してやる!この世から一匹残らず!
romaji: Kuchiku shite yaru! Kono yo kara ippiki nokorazu!
english: I'll exterminate them! Every last one from this world! (alt wording 36) (alt wording 88)

japanese: 俺たちの物語は、ここからだ
romaji: Oretachi no monogatari wa, koko kara da
english: Our story starts here.
